name: founder-suite
description: Founder toolkit for Claude Code: validate a market, then decide what to build. Bundles two skills — market-validation (multi-angle web research with live-URL verification → cited evidence pack → Tufte HTML deck + PDF/PPTX + a build brief) and build-options (divergent options → independent judge-panel weighted decision matrix → adversarial stress-test → a recommended build with kill criteria). Designed to chain: market-validation → build-options → prd → tasks.
